title: Vouacapoua legalis
taxonomy: Vouacapoua legalis is a species of flowering plant in the family Caesalpinaceae. It belongs to the genus Vouacapoua, which is a group of tropical trees native to the tropical regions of Africa. This plant is a type of caesalpinoid tree, characterized by its broad, flat leaves and showy, white flowers. Vouacapoua legalis is an important part of its native ecosystem, providing food and shelter for various animals and supporting the local biodiversity.
